title: Spy in Your Eye
writer: Lucio Marcuzzo, Adriano Bolzoni, Romano Ferrara
actors: Brett Halsey, Pier Angeli, Gastone Moschin
plot: A leading American spy has a miniature camera surgically implanted in his eye, unbeknownst to him, and with it photographs secrets for the Russians, helping them gather information about a newly created death ray.
